theme_archetype.name: Archetype 4 (Swiss & High-Contrast) - Dark Mode Adaptation
theme_archetype.rationale: Vantage requires a professional, authoritative, and clean SaaS aesthetic. The dark mode combined with high-contrast elements conveys cutting-edge AI capability while avoiding the muddy 'tech-bro' tropes. It's sophisticated, sharp, and highly legible.

hierarchy.h1: text-5xl sm:text-6xl md:text-7xl font-semibold tracking-tighter leading-[1.1]
hierarchy.h2: text-3xl sm:text-4xl md:text-5xl font-medium tracking-tight leading-tight
hierarchy.label: text-xs font-semibold tracking-[0.2em] uppercase text-zinc-500

rules: Headings must use Outfit. Never use Inter for headings.
Always apply tight tracking (tracking-tight or tighter) to headings over 32px.
Never center align dense content; left-align by default unless the section specifically calls for a symmetrical focal point.

surfaces_and_fx.card_default: bg-[#0A0A0B] border border-white/5 rounded-2xl p-8 hover:bg-[#121214] transition-colors duration-300
surfaces_and_fx.card_glow: bg-[#0A0A0B] border border-indigo-500/30 rounded-2xl p-8 shadow-[0_0_30px_rgba(79,70,229,0.15)]
rules: Use purely CSS borders and shadows for UIs, do not rely on images for container aesthetics.
Elements inside cards must have appropriate breathing room (p-6 or p-8).
Never use pure black #000000; always use tinted blacks.
Generous Spacing Philosophy: Use wide gaps (gap-6 to gap-12).
Mobile-First: Start with single columns, then scale up.
Animations should feel organic and premium, not fast and aggressive.
Always respect prefers-reduced-motion in Framer Motion configurations.

buttons.primary: inline-flex items-center justify-center rounded-full bg-white text-black px-6 py-3 text-sm font-medium hover:bg-zinc-200 transition-colors
buttons.secondary: inline-flex items-center justify-center rounded-full bg-transparent border border-white/20 text-white px-6 py-3 text-sm font-medium hover:bg-white/5 transition-colors
buttons.accent: inline-flex items-center justify-center rounded-full bg-indigo-600 text-white px-6 py-3 text-sm font-medium hover:bg-indigo-500 transition-colors

inputs.default: bg-black/50 border border-white/10 rounded-lg px-4 py-3 text-white placeholder:text-zinc-600 focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-indigo-500/50 focus:border-indigo-500/50 transition-all

components.shadcn_overrides: Override all default Vercel-like radii and borders. Buttons should be fully rounded (rounded-full) for primary CTAs, and rounded-xl/2xl for cards.

media_assets.description: Minimalist dark abstract texture to be used as a subtle background pattern for the Hero section or Page wrapper. Use with low opacity (10-20%).
Abstract 3D node matching visualization. Use in the Hero section alongside the main text. Ensure max-h-[600px] and subtle floating animation via framer-motion.
Portrait image of Aidan Kelley (Founder) for the About section. Use in a 4:5 ratio, rounded-2xl, with a grayscale filter (grayscale hover:grayscale-0 transition).

sections.name: Navigation
sections.details: Sticky top, Crystal variant (bg-[#0A0A0B]/60 backdrop-blur-xl border-b border-white/5). Links: How it works, Pricing, Free Audit. CTA: Join Waitlist (White filled button). Must have z-50.

sections.name: Hero
sections.details: Layout: Grid cols-1 lg:grid-cols-2. Left: H1 'Brand deals. Automated.', Subtitle, CTAs ('Try Free Audit →' white button, 'Join Waitlist' transparent button). Right: hero_illustration asset with floating animation. Background uses hero_background at 10% opacity.

sections.name: Scrolling Ticker
sections.details: Use react-fast-marquee. Text only, separated by '·' or small lucide stars. Text should be uppercase, tracking-widest, text-zinc-500, slow speed. Terms: Brands, Agencies, Creators, AI Matching, Brand Deals, No Spreadsheets, 30 Seconds, $200B Market, Zero Agencies.

sections.name: Problem Section
sections.details: H2: 'The creator economy is $200B. The matching layer is broken.' Bento grid of 3 cards. Cards must use glassmorphism with slight inner border. Icons from lucide-react (e.g., SearchX, Users, TrendingDown).

sections.name: How it works
sections.details: Vertical timeline or 4-step horizontal process. Bold numbers (text-6xl text-white/10 font-bold). Steps: 1. Describe campaign 2. AI matches creators 3. Brief/Approve/Publish 4. Real ROI.

sections.name: Pricing
sections.details: 3 tiers (Starter, Growth, Agency). Growth tier must have the 'Tracing Beam' glow border (border-indigo-500/50 shadow-glow) and 'Most Popular' badge. All CTAs say 'Join Waitlist →'. Overline text noting '3 months free' above the grid.

sections.name: About
sections.details: Founder story. Grid layout with founder_portrait image on left, text on right. Grayscale image filter.

sections.name: FAQ
sections.details: Shadcn accordion components. Minimal styling, white/10 borders.

sections.name: Waitlist CTA
sections.details: Massive typography. Form containing Email input, Select dropdown (Brand/Creator/Agency), Submit button. Success message on submission.

audit_app.details: Multi-screen quiz logic. Must have a fixed header with progress bar (indigo-500). One question per screen. Framer-motion for sliding between steps (AnimatePresence).
flow: Step 1-9: Simple forms, large clickable option cards (bg-zinc-900 border-white/10 hover:border-indigo-500).
Loading State: 2-3 seconds, ASCII art or spinner with 'Analyzing your campaign setup...'
Results State: AI-generated personalized insights based on answers. Campaign Health Summary, Top 3 Problems, Next 3 Actions. Bottom CTA linking to /#waitlist.

technical_rules.testing: All interactive elements MUST include data-testid (e.g., data-testid='hero-cta-audit', data-testid='waitlist-submit-button').
technical_rules.accessibility: Contrast ratios must pass APCA/WCAG. Focus states must be visible (focus:ring-2 focus:ring-indigo-500/50).
technical_rules.components: Use shadcn/ui for Select, Accordion, Progress, Dialog. Always customize Shadcn defaults to match this design system.
